prompt: Create a premium minimalist fashion advertisement poster in a tall vertical format for a folded crew-neck t-shirt brand. Use a deep matte black background with a subtle cracked stone or concrete texture, almost disappearing into shadow. Place 1 neatly folded white t-shirt at the exact center, viewed from above, with soft sculptural lighting from above that creates a faint halo glow around the shirt and a clean shadow beneath it. The t-shirt should look luxurious, thick, smooth, and wrinkle-controlled, with a visible inner collar print reading JUGGERKNOT ORIGINALS. At the very top, place oversized elegant serif numerals reading 365. in a very dark charcoal gray, spanning nearly the full width and partially fading into the background. Beneath the shirt, add the centered tagline Days. Not excuses. in spaced white sans-serif text. Below that, add a smaller all-caps line in muted gray reading INDIA'S FIRST 365-DAY WARRANTY TEE. Along the lower left edge, place 1 vertical line of tiny white text reading "SUPIMA® COTTON | INVISIBLE STITCH | NO LOGO." At the bottom center, place 1 small emblem above the bold brand name "JUGGERKNOT" in white geometric sans-serif lettering. Overall style: luxury streetwear campaign, brutalist minimalism, high contrast, editorial product poster, clean typography, premium monochrome palette, dramatic negative space, photorealistic fabric detail.
